question:
Why is "greenwashing" considered a deceptive business practice?
A) It forces the company to paint all of its products the color green.
B) It makes the products legally immune to taxation.
C) It misleads consumers into believing a company is environmentally friendly, diverting support from truly sustainable practices.
D) It actively destroys the ozone layer directly through advertising.

B) It makes the products legally immune to taxation.
C) It misleads consumers into believing a company is environmentally friendly, diverting support from truly sustainable practices.
